response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal tracks match the lyrics provided in the reference JSON perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized to structure and transcribe the songs accurately, filtering out background instrumentals and aligning text blocks tightly with the vocal performance. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were strictly anchored to the vocal onset and offset, applying logical phrase segmentation to prevent any cascading delays during the rapid parts of 'RIDE ON TIME'.

subtitles.original: Three loving hearts are pullin' apart of one
subtitles.english: Three loving hearts are pulling apart of one
Can't stop you
Can't hold you
Can't wait no more

subtitles.original: I'm just a woman, Fall in love
subtitles.english: I'm just a woman, Fall in love

subtitles.original: I'm just a woman, Fall in love
subtitles.english: I'm just a woman, Fall in love
The blue horizon...
...I'm running through it now.
Feeling the flow...
...of sharpened time.
Towards excitement...
...the world begins to move.
Bringing back...
...a distant dream I'd almost forgotten.

subtitles.original: Ride on time さまよう想いなら
subtitles.english: Ride on time, if your thoughts are wandering

subtitles.original: やさしく受け止めて そっと包んで
subtitles.english: Accept them gently and wrap them up softly

subtitles.original: Ride on time 心に火を点けて
subtitles.english: Ride on time, light a fire in my heart

subtitles.original: あふれる喜びに 拡がれ Ride on time
subtitles.english: Spread to the overflowing joy, Ride on time
My shining future...
...is starting to turn now.

subtitles.original: 虚ろな日々も全て 愛に溶け込む
subtitles.english: Even the empty days will all melt into love.

subtitles.original: 何という朝 今すぐ君のもと
subtitles.english: What a morning! Right now, to your side...
...I'll go to deliver...
...my burning...
...heart...
...without hesitation.

subtitles.original: Ride on time 時よ走り出せ
subtitles.english: Ride on time, time, start running!

subtitles.original: 愛よ光り出せ 目もくらむ程
subtitles.english: Love, start shining, even to the point of being blinded!

subtitles.original: Ride on time 心に火を点けて
subtitles.english: Ride on time, light a fire in my heart

subtitles.original: 飛び立つ魂に送るよ Ride on time
subtitles.english: I'll send it to the soul taking flight, Ride on time
I will go to deliver...
...my burning heart, now is the time!
Oh...
